faq.subtitle: These are some of the most common questions we get asked. For a full list of FAQs please visit our <faq-link>FAQ page</faq-link>.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

auto_revoke.description: Let Revoke.cash watch your approvals around the clock and revoke risky ones automatically on your behalf. Set-and-forget protection for your wallet, even while you sleep.
auto_revoke.title: Automated Revoking

dashboard.description: Get a clear overview of every token approval you've ever granted. Sort, filter, and revoke the ones you no longer need all from one simple dashboard.
dashboard.title: Approval Dashboard

exploit_checker.description: Automatically check your approvals against known exploits to see if any of your approvals are at risk.
exploit_checker.title: Exploit Checker

hero_section.subtitle: Inspect and revoke token approvals to protect your wallet from exploits and scams.
hero_section.title: Take Back Control of <highlight>Your Wallet.</highlight>

paragraph_1.description: Click Connect Wallet on the top right or enter an address in the search bar.
paragraph_1.title: 1. Connect

paragraph_2.description: Inspect your approvals by using the network selection, sorting and filtering options.
paragraph_2.title: 2. Inspect

paragraph_3.description: Revoke the approvals that you no longer use to prevent unwanted access to your funds.
paragraph_3.title: 3. Revoke

premium.description: Monitor and protect your token approvals across 100+ networks. Starting at {price}/year.
premium.title: Revoke Premium

ultimate_features.automated_revoking_tooltip: Requires MetaMask. Supported on select networks.

quotes.beausecurity: Super important reminder that just because a smart contract hasn't been exploited yet, doesn't mean it won't be. Revoke old approvals to smart contracts you aren't using anymore. It's well worth it. Use Revoke.cash.
quotes.nft_dreww: We all have phones, set a reminder right now to visit Revoke.cash and check your approvals weekly. This takes 30 seconds and can prevent hackers from stealing your assets.
quotes.rsquare: One of the best things you can do with Safe when it comes to reacting quickly to incidents is to conveniently revoke approvals with the Revoke.cash Safe App.
